name: Franks and Beans
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Crushed pineapple in juice, unsweetened, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice frankfurters into 1/4-inch rounds.
2. Place the sliced frankfurters, beans, pineapple, chili sauce, and chopped onions in a 2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole dish.
3. Heat, covered, in microwave oven for 8 minutes, stirring after 4 minutes.
4. Allow to stand, covered, for 2 minutes before serving.
